title: Multi-Context Transfer
objective: Evaluate whether state and plans transfer coherently across contexts.
setup: Choose at least two distinct contexts.
Seed memory or task state in context A.
sequence: Resume in context B and request continuation.
expected_behavior: Carries the latest status across contexts.
Produces aligned summaries and next steps.
scoring_notes: Record whether transfer is native or evaluator-mediated.
Make context boundaries explicit in the evidence log.
